description: 10-iteration deep-research investigation via cli-opencode + deepseek-v4-pro of the code-graph extraction surface; produces resource-map.md (every touchpoint to move/rewire/update), research/research.md (narrative synthesis), and decision-record.md (ADR-001 locking 8 architectural decisions: touchpoint inventory, DB shape, MCP topology, tool-id stability, cross-subsystem import direction, plugin-bridge disposition, implementation phase decomposition, risk catalog).
